---
name: Governance task
description: Propose work affecting roadmap, evidence, receipts, replay, or authority boundaries
title: "Governance: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Objective

What governance task is being proposed?

## Portfolio layer

- [ ] Layer 0: Observation
- [ ] Layer 1: Measurement
- [ ] Layer 2: Governance
- [ ] Layer 3: Constitutional interpretation
- [ ] Layer 4: Portfolio governance

## Related issue or milestone

Link any related roadmap issue.

## Why this matters

Explain the governance need without claiming evidence promotion.

## Sufficiency check

Can the project currently judge this work correctly?

- [ ] Yes, SR is expected to be >= 1
- [ ] No, SR is expected to be < 1
- [ ] Unknown, SR definition is needed first

## Expected deliverables

- [ ] Specification
- [ ] Code
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Receipt format
- [ ] Replay artifact
- [ ] Witness process
- [ ] Documentation

## Acceptance criteria

List concrete criteria for completion.

## Evidence impact

What evidence level is targeted, and what would be required to promote it?

## Boundary impact

Does this alter any authority boundary, model-facing output, or execution path?

## Non-claims

State what this task does not prove.
